feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, and amounts may approach warning criteria. Localised downpours are possible from Wednesday evening onwards. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 60 to 80 mm of rain on top of what has fallen, especially inland. Peaks rates of 25 to 40 mm/h possible in localised downpours and possible thunderstorms. Note, there is uncertainty about the clearance of heavy rain and the validity of this warning could be extended. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Minimal.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain. Localised downpours and thunderstorms are possible. Rainfall amounts may approach warning criteria. Note, rainfall is expected to ease from the west during the afternoon and evening. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Validity of Watch extended to 9pm.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, and amounts may approach warning criteria. Localised downpours and thunderstorms are possible. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, and amounts may approach warning criteria. Localised downpours and thunderstorms are possible. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Low. Changes: Chance of upgrade to warning reduced to low.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
